issues.description: First effect targets only opponent Characters with cost 0, but card text says 'cost of 0 OR your opponent's Stages with a cost of 3 or less' — missing Stage targeting entirely
Second effect has no cost restriction and no Stage targeting — incomplete implementation of the OR clause
DrawCard action with count:2 appears unrelated to card text '[Main] K.O. up to 1...' — no draw effect mentioned in official text
Should be single OnPlay effect with OR target logic for (OpponentCharacter cost≤0) OR (OpponentStage cost≤3), not three separate effects

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 0 or your opponent's Stages with a cost of 3 or less.
